activity_keyword: neighbourhood house|community house|neighbourhood centre|neighborhood centre|community centre
notes: Purpose column covers 14k+ charities — too broad alone. Name keywords narrow to neighbourhood houses and community centres specifically.

acnc_subtype: Advancing the security or safety of Australia or the Australian public

Purpose column returns 859 charities and is specific enough. No keyword filter applied.
